title: Makefile: update epoch validation commit to v1.0.1

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *vbatts* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2458) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

Well good grief

On Tue, Feb 26, 2019, 18:48 Atomic Bot <notifications@github.com> wrote:

Oh, oops - the release script we use automatically updates the epoch, so it looks like we overwrote this

No worries. Baude had just said it was a slow point in the CI
